'''Tharlst squad''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] unit of eight elite [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] serving on the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dominator (Victory-class)|''Dominator'']]. They participated in the [[Battle of Taul]]. They were armed with [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]], and had a demolitions [[Specialist/Legends|specialist]] carrying three [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Uninvited Guests}}
